name: Starter Town: Brightwater
summary: A ready-to-run frontier town with key hooks, handouts, and a first-night encounter.

quests.title: The Lost Ledger
quests.summary: Recover the mayor's stolen ledger before dawn.
quests.description: A guild courier was ambushed near the old watchtower. Recover the ledger, identify the thieves, and return it quietly.
objective_list: Track muddy boot prints to the watchtower

handouts.title: Guild Notice: Missing Ledger
handouts.public_text: A black-bound ledger was stolen from the guild courier route. Return by sunrise for reward and discretion.
handouts.dm_secret_text: The ledger also contains a coded smuggling route linked to Captain Renn's rival.

pois.name: Old Watchtower
pois.description: A crumbling watchtower used by smugglers.

encounters.name: Street Cutpurses
encounters.notes: Use as opening pressure in alleys near the square.

name: One-Shot: Ruined Shrine Crawl
summary: Compact evening adventure with clue trail, shrine POI, and two escalating encounter groups.

quests.title: Echoes Beneath the Shrine
quests.summary: Find the source of night-time bell tolls at a ruined shrine.
quests.description: Villagers hear ghostly bell sounds from a shrine sealed decades ago. Investigate, recover the relic, and stop the restless guardians.
objective_list: Speak with Acolyte Selan about the shrine history
Open the lower crypt and survive the guardian ambush
Recover the Dawn Bell and return it to the village

handouts.title: Stone Rubbing: Bell Inscription
handouts.public_text: When dawn is silenced, ring thrice where roots embrace stone.
handouts.dm_secret_text: Hint points to hidden switch behind root-covered wall tile in shrine map.

pois.name: Ruined Shrine
pois.description: Collapsed shrine with an accessible lower crypt.
